creator: jake@checker.org
text:
diff -urN /usr/ports/java/shujit/Makefile shujit/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/java/shujit/Makefile	Wed Aug 25 12:13:35 1999
+++ shujit/Makefile	Fri Sep  3 16:21:25 1999
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	shujit
-# Version required:	0.3.1b
+# Version required:	0.3.8
 # Date created:		30 April 1999
 # Whom:			jake@checker.org
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/java/shujit/Makefile,v 1.8 1999/08/25 06:16:31 obrien Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	shujit-0.3.1b
+DISTNAME=	shujit-0.3.8
 CATEGORIES=	java
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.shudo.net/jit/dist/old/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.shudo.net/jit/dist/
 
 MAINTAINER=	jake@checker.org
 
diff -urN /usr/ports/java/shujit/files/md5 shujit/files/md5
--- /usr/ports/java/shujit/files/md5	Sun Aug  1 08:55:45 1999
+++ shujit/files/md5	Fri Sep  3 16:21:49 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (shujit-0.3.1b.tar.gz) = 8816b063c60d8918deebab247ee0e51f
+MD5 (shujit-0.3.8.tar.gz) = 9d7ef6981440f133270bc4e52662597c

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
